description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by a dense perimeter of mature trees and enclosed by a low fence. The house features a flat, angular roof with multiple sections, and a mix of light and dark exterior surfaces, likely concrete, stucco, and glass. The property includes a paved driveway leading to a carport or garage, as well as a landscaped yard with patio areas and outdoor seating. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is set back from the street, accessed via a walkway flanked by trees and greenery. The overall layout emphasizes privacy, outdoor living, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat, angular roof, surrounded by trees and a fence, featuring large windows and a landscaped yard with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, carport, and a clear arrangement of trees and fencing.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the backyard, patio area, and the angular roof design with more visible outdoor space.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the driveway, carport, and the linear arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the rear garden, patio, and the dense tree line enclosing the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a paved walkway, minimal overhang, and surrounded by landscaping and trees
